if.test: keyword != null and keyword !="" and (searchType == null or searchType =="")

sql.if: AND (a.user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') or a.admin_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') or b.company_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

choose.when: AND b.company_mno LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchCompanyMno}, '%') AND FIND_IN_SET(#{searchCompanyMno}, b.company_mno) = 0

mapper.sql: a.id ,a.admin_id ,a.password ,a.user_name ,a.user_name as adminUserName ,a.auth_type ,GET_CODE_NAME('admin_auth_type', auth_type) authTypeNm ,a.com_group ,AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(phone_number), 'tb_mbm_admin_user') phone_number ,AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(email), 'tb_mbm_admin_user') email ,a.all_auth_yn ,a.admin_mem_auth_yn ,a.user_mng_yn ,a.company_mng_yn ,a.prod_mng_yn ,a.req_mng_yn ,a.settle_mng_yn ,a.service_mng_yn ,a.service_mng_yn ,a.service_mng_yn ,a.service_mng_yn ,a.point_mng_yn ,a.sales_mng_yn ,a.kakao_msg_mng_yn ,a.manage_id ,a.disable ,a.create_date ,a.create_id ,a.modified_date ,a.modified_id ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(a.create_id) as createNm ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(a.modified_id) as modifiedNm ,a.company_code ,b.name companyNm ,b.company_nm businessNm ,b.company_code businessCode ,b.company_mno companyMno ,b.simple_open_yn
mapper.select: SELECT count(1) FROM tb_mbm_admin_user a LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_mbm_company_list b ON a.company_code = b.id WHERE 1=1

SELECT
FROM tb_mbm_admin_user a LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_mbm_company_list b ON a.company_code = b.id WHERE a.id=#{id}

SELECT
FROM tb_mbm_admin_user a LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_mbm_company_list b ON a.company_code = b.id WHERE a.admin_id=#{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_mbm_admin_user (admin_id, password, user_name, auth_type, com_group, phone_number, email, all_auth_yn, admin_mem_auth_yn, user_mng_yn, company_mng_yn, prod_mng_yn, req_mng_yn, settle_mng_yn,service_mng_yn ,point_mng_yn ,sales_mng_yn ,kakao_msg_mng_yn, company_code, manage_id, disable, create_id, modified_id) VALUES( #{adminId}, #{password}, #{userName}, #{authType}, #{comGroup}, TO_BASE64(AES_ENCRYPT(#{phoneNumber},'tb_mbm_admin_user')), TO_BASE64(AES_ENCRYPT(#{email},'tb_mbm_admin_user')), #{allAuthYn}, #{adminMemAuthYn}, #{userMngYn}, #{companyMngYn}, #{prodMngYn}, #{reqMngYn}, #{settleMngYn}, #{serviceMngYn}, #{pointMngYn}, #{salesMngYn}, #{kakaoMsgMngYn}, #{companyCode}, #{manageId}, #{disable}, #{createId}, #{modifiedId} );
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_mbm_admin_user SET admin_id = #{adminId}, password = #{password}, create_id = #{createId}, modified_id = #{modifiedId}, modified_date=NOW() WHERE id=#{id};
